release_notes: Adds visual emphasis to incoming Ready messages in the Ready Messages log. The most recently received incoming Ready now appears bold at 15pt in the theme's darkest color, with a brief 'pop' size animation (8pt → 17pt peak → 15pt settled, ~320ms) when it arrives. The second-most-recent incoming Ready gets a smaller bump (12pt bold, same dark color). Older messages and any outgoing/sent Ready messages keep the existing 10pt log styling. The emphasis color is theme-aware: deep navy in Modern Blue, deep forest in Sage Clinic, deep burgundy in Rose Quartz. Each theme dict now defines an 'emph_dark' value the log tags read on every theme change. Internally, two Tk Text tags (recent1, recent2) plus a small after-loop drive the animation; tag ranges are tracked via Text marks so they survive scrolling and other log appends.
